results.rendered_html: N. of an author (son of Kāma-deva; he lived in the 13th century A.D. and wrote the encyclopaedical wk. Catur-varga-cintāmaṇi, divided into 5 Khaṇḍas, Vrata, Dāna, Tīrtha, Mokṣa, and Pariśeṣa),  Cat.

results.rendered_html:
hemādri (2. heman + adri) m.
1〉 der Goldberg, Bez. des Meru  AK. 1,1,1,45 .  HALĀY. 1,136 .  Verz. d. Oxf. H. 139,b, No. 279 .
— 2〉 N. pr. eines Autors  WEBER, KṚṢṆAJ. 236  u. s. w.  Ind. St. 3,247 .  Verz. d. B. H. No. 1025 . 1170 . 1176 . 1178 . 1403 .  Verz. d. Oxf. H. 37,b,3 v. u. 38,a,8 . b,15 . 164,a,9 . 274,a,1 . 275,a,36 . 280,a,12 . 281,a, No. 659 . 287,b, No. 679 . 309,a,37 . 341,a,1 v. u .  HALL 18 . 174 . 176 . 183 .  BURNOUF _in_ BHĀG. P. I, LX . ˚vratavidhi und ˚śānti  MACK. Coll. 1,34 .
— Vgl. dāna˚ und bṛhaddhemādri.
